description: Distributed Node 20 and Node 22 no-browser compatibility owners without package or browser duplication.
Single same-run package producer with rename readiness, dry-run file-set validation, full-revision manifest, and bounded artifact retention.
Distributed Node 20 and Node 22 consumers that verify and test the exact producer tarball without repacking.
Single Control Center build and browser execution owner with exact-key Playwright binary caching and no cached test result reuse.
Lightweight full-history repository contract and PR/push-range document synchronization job without duplicate product or browser tests.
Proof-only terminal owner that binds every required job result to one workflow run, attempt, full HEAD, policy, and CI graph without rerunning suites.
Development workflow rejection tests remain part of both declared Node compatibility executions while the dependency-free current-policy check runs in repository contracts.
Dependency-free verification policy, exact-owner graph, cache boundary, and workflow composition validation.
Product-local CI manifest validation without remote execution.
